0 sheep

Dorper Farm

Sheep registry · multi-owner · breed-aware

Record event
add

Add sheep

External ram placeholder
For borrowed rams, AI semen lots, or rams seen at neighbour farms. Used so lambing records can reference a sire by tag without inventing free-text descriptions. Default tag prefix: EXT-. Only basic fields apply (tag, sex M, breed, source).
event

Record event

Each lamb gets a registry record. Owner inherits from the ewe (Cheison's rule).
Expected lambing: ~150 days from served date.
Saving sets sheep status to sold.
Saving sets sheep status to gifted_away. No money is recorded — the recipient and occasion are.
Saving sets sheep status to died.

Dairy

Cow registry · multi-owner · breed-aware · semen-source tracked

add

Add cow

event

Record event

Routine hoof trim. Note any issues found in the notes field.
Saving sets cow status to sold.
Saving sets cow status to died.
Record the calving event here. Add each calf as a new cow in the registry (+ Add cow) — owner inherits from the dam.
milking

Log milking

Log service · —

Record the service date. Expected calving auto-computes (service + 280 days). For cows already known to be in-calf without a recorded service date, enter the best-known date — operators can refine later.

About

v6.11.36
Sinonin Group Management App · Built for the Sinonin–Kipkenda farms in Nandi County: tea, poultry, dorper sheep, coffee, maize. Five input streams — plucker entries, actuals, expenses, banked income, poultry sales — all push to Google Forms on Drive, and read back from a shared Apps Script endpoint. Every phone sees the farm's full state.
Sinonin Tea · The Tea of Champions

Backup & Restore

your safety net
Export downloads everything on this device — entries, expenses, actuals, banked, poultry, the plucker roster, factory rates, expense categories, settings — into one dated JSON file you can email to yourself or save to Drive. Import restores from a previously-saved file. Tip: export before any major change.

Update guidance

Never uninstall the app to update. The app updates itself when a new version ships — just close it (swipe away from recent apps) and reopen. Uninstalling wipes new pluckers, sync queue, and any data not yet pushed to your Sheet. Export a backup first if you must reinstall.
Entry Saved

Authenticate

Kiruogindet araap Cheison

Choose how to authenticate:

Revoke writes?

Close the gate immediately

The gate will close. Any in-flight queue items will be blocked until reopened. This action is logged in the audit trail.

Lock & exit admin?

Return to operator view

The padlock will turn red. Settings tab will hide. The gate state stays as it is — close it first if you also want writes locked.
